Case Study Brand Creative &amp; Content Execution/ In-house production Integrated Marketing Media Planning &amp; Management Strategy

Baptist Health South Florida

September 5, 2025
BAPTIST HEALTH

Turning Awareness Into Action With a High-Impact Men's Health Campaign

https://vimeo.com/1114018825/6b13950543

When Baptist Health South Florida set out to activate a bold new Men’s Health initiative, they partnered with BPD to move fast. Together we created a campaign that turned awareness into action. In just weeks, we built a strategic platform rooted in urgency, truth-telling, and cultural relevance, brought to life by NBA legend Alonzo Mourning. The result: a high-impact, multi-channel campaign that broke the silence around men’s health and drove measurable behavior change. Together, we transformed a compressed timeline into a movement. One built to shift mindsets, spark conversation, and get men to take the first step.

CAMPAIGN RESULTS

49%+ Brand awareness among men 19M+ Impressions 35% Reduction in brand
awareness gender gap https://vimeo.com/1128969505/781fc641b2?share=copy&fl=sv&fe=ci https://vimeo.com/1128964342/8770e241ba?share=copy&fl=sv&fe=ci https://vimeo.com/1128964201/74ba0aba03?share=copy&fl=sv&fe=ci
